title: Xtones
description: Adds various of modern, futuristic, and fantasy style decorative building blocks. The "official" successor to Ztones
body:
# Xtones
Xtones is a mod for Minecraft 1.10 and above that adds various of modern, futuristic, and fantasy style decorative building blocks. It is an open-source clone of [Ztones](https://minecraft.curseforge.com/projects/ztones) and uses the official textures with permission from the original author. **This is a clean-room rewrite of the old codebase. Some features may differ from the original.**

Connected/emissive textures are not included.

## Archival notice
**This mod is abandoned and has been uploaded for archival purposes. It was [originally created](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hwyla) by [TehNut](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/TehNut/projects) on Jan 19, 2017. It has been uploaded to Modrinth under the ModrinthArchives account with permission from the original author.**

![Discord screenshot showing permission to upload](https://cdn.modrinth.com/archives/tehnut-permission.png)
